target: ACL27 supplement page 17 VLM coordinate table companion v3
reason_independent_review_not_used: Subagent spawning is restricted to explicit user requests in this environment; review followed the render-visual-reviewer checklist locally.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks.
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, matching the sparse-page density audit.
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90.

layout_iterations.result: Accepted: supplement stayed at 45 pages and page 17 active245 increased over the round28 sparse-page audit.

visual_review.standalone_figure: PASS: the v3 companion uses a denser coordinate-contract slot and a taller registered coordinate-frame render audit strip while preserving the four paired target-view cards.
visual_review.pdf_page_17: PASS: the coordinate table remains readable, the companion becomes the page's visual body, and caption plus explanatory paragraph remain separated without clipping.
visual_review.neighbor_pages: PASS: page 16 remains the coordinate protocol atlas and page 18 remains the baseline sanity companion; no float displacement or page-count spill was observed in the 45-page build.
visual_review.claim_boundary: PASS: the caption states that the v3 AI-generated coordinate-contract schematic is only for exposition and is not an additional VLM prediction or benchmark row.
